 {"id":"bd-tggf","title":"Code Health Review Dec 2025: Technical Debt Cleanup","description":"Epic grouping technical debt identified in the Dec 16, 2025 code health review.

## Overall Health Grade: B (Solid foundation, needs cleanup)

### P1 (High Priority):
- bd-74w1: Consolidate duplicate path-finding utilities
- [deleted:bd-b6xo]: Remove/fix ClearDirtyIssues() race condition
- [deleted:bd-b3og]: Fix TestImportBugIntegration deadlock

### P2 (Medium Priority):
- bd-05a8: Split large files (doctor.go, sync.go)
- bd-qioh: Standardize error handling patterns
- bd-rgyd: Split queries.go (1586 lines)
- bd-9g1z: Fix/remove TestFindJSONLPathDefault

### P3 (Low Priority):
- bd-ork0: Add comments to 30+ ignored errors
- bd-4nqq: Remove dead test code in info_test.go
- bd-dhza: Reduce global state in main.go

## Key Areas:
1. Code duplication in path utilities
2. Large monolithic files (5 files >1000 lines)
3. Global state (25+ variables, 3 deprecated)
4. Silent error suppression (30+ instances)
5. Test gaps and dead test code
6. Atomicity risks in batch operations","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2025-12-16T18:18:58.115507-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-30T18:12:30.962234-08:00","closed_at":"2025-12-30T16:59:51.322347-08:00","close_reason":"All technical debt cleanup tasks completed: path utilities consolidated, large files split, error handling standardized, dead test code removed, global state reduced, ignored errors documented","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-tggf","depends_on_id":"bd-74w1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-22T21:00:21.429274-08:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"bd-tggf","depends_on_id":"bd-05a8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-22T21:00:21.501589-08:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"bd-tggf","depends_on_id":"bd-9g1z","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-22T21:00:21.571116-08:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"bd-tggf","depends_on_id":"bd-qioh","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-22T21:00:21.640589-08:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"bd-tggf","depends_on_id":"bd-rgyd","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-22T21:00:21.710912-08:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"bd-tggf","depends_on_id":"bd-4nqq","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-22T21:00:21.781914-08:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"bd-tggf","depends_on_id":"bd-dhza","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-22T21:00:21.852-08:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"bd-tggf","depends_on_id":"bd-ork0","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-22T21:00:21.930168-08:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}

 {"id":"bd-u2sc","title":"GH#692: Code quality and refactoring improvements","description":"Epic for implementing refactoring suggestions from GitHub issue #692 (rsnodgrass). These are code quality improvements that don't change functionality but improve maintainability, type safety, and performance.

Original issue: https://github.com/steveyegge/beads/issues/692

High priority items:
1. Replace map[string]interface{} with typed structs for JSON output
2. Adopt slices.SortFunc instead of sort.Slice (Go 1.21+)
3. Split large files (sync.go, init.go, show.go)
4. Introduce slog for structured logging in daemon

Lower priority:
5. Further CLI helper extraction
6. Preallocate slices in hot paths
7. Polish items (error wrapping, table-driven parsing)","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2025-12-22T14:26:31.630004-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-23T22:07:32.477628-08:00","closed_at":"2025-12-23T22:07:32.477628-08:00"}
 {"id":"bd-u2sc.1","title":"Replace map[string]interface{} with typed JSON response structs","description":"Many CLI commands use map[string]interface{} for JSON output which loses type safety and compile-time error detection.

Files with map[string]interface{}:
- cmd/bd/compact.go (10+ instances)
- cmd/bd/cleanup.go
- cmd/bd/daemons.go
- cmd/bd/daemon_lifecycle.go

Example fix:
```go
// Before
result := map[string]interface{}{
    "status": "ok",
    "count": 42,
}

// After
type CompactResponse struct {
    Status string `json:"status"`
    Count  int    `json:"count"`
}
result := CompactResponse{Status: "ok", Count: 42}
```

Benefits:
- Compile-time type checking
- IDE autocompletion
- Easier refactoring
- Self-documenting API","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-22T14:26:44.088548-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-22T15:48:22.88824-08:00","closed_at":"2025-12-22T15:48:22.88824-08:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-u2sc.1","depends_on_id":"bd-u2sc","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-22T14:26:44.088931-08:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
 {"id":"bd-u2sc.2","title":"Migrate sort.Slice to slices.SortFunc","description":"Go 1.21+ provides slices.SortFunc which is cleaner and slightly faster than sort.Slice.

Found 15+ instances of sort.Slice in:
- cmd/bd/autoflush.go
- cmd/bd/count.go
- cmd/bd/daemon_sync.go
- cmd/bd/doctor.go
- cmd/bd/export.go
- cmd/bd/import.go
- cmd/bd/integrity.go
- cmd/bd/jira.go
- cmd/bd/list.go
- cmd/bd/migrate_hash_ids.go
- cmd/bd/rename_prefix.go
- cmd/bd/show.go

Example migration:
```go
// Before
sort.Slice(issues, func(i, j int) bool {
    return issues[i].Priority < issues[j].Priority
})

// After
slices.SortFunc(issues, func(a, b *types.Issue) int {
    return cmp.Compare(a.Priority, b.Priority)
})
```

Benefits:
- Cleaner 3-way comparison
- Slightly better performance
- Modern idiomatic Go","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-22T14:26:55.573524-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-22T15:10:12.639807-08:00","closed_at":"2025-12-22T15:10:12.639807-08:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-u2sc.2","depends_on_id":"bd-u2sc","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-22T14:26:55.573978-08:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
